# 🐞 Issue Report / Feature Request

Thank you for taking the time to open an issue! Please fill out the details below to help us understand and resolve it efficiently.

---

## 📌 Issue Type

Please select one:

- [ ] Bug report 🐞
- [ ] Feature request 🚀
- [ ] UI/UX improvement 🎨
- [ ] Documentation update 📚
- [ ] Other

---

## 📝 Description

A clear and concise description of the issue or feature request.

---

## 🔁 Steps to Reproduce (for bugs)

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll to '...'
4. See error

---

## ✅ Expected Behavior

Describe what you expected to happen.

---

## ❌ Actual Behavior

Describe what actually happened.

---

## 🖼️ Screenshots (if applicable)

Attach screenshots or screen recordings to help explain your issue.

---

## 🧪 Environment Details

- Chrome Version:
- OS:
- Extension Version:

---

## 💡 Additional Context

Add any other context, links, or references about the issue here.

---
